home.title: Choose a process
home.heroSubtitle: Track forms, key dates, reminders, and next steps in one simple place.
home.tpsSubtitle: Renew TPS and organize your filing checklist.
home.travelSubtitle: Review travel authorization forms and timing.
home.quickResourcesSub: Open USCIS forms, fees, and legal help.

onboarding.languageBody: You can change this later from the top-left button on Home.
onboarding.title: Stay organized without guessing.
onboarding.subtitle: A calm place to track immigration forms, dates, reminders, and official resources.
onboarding.organizeBody: Use guided checklists for TPS, work permits, and travel authorization.
onboarding.remindersBody: Create notification reminders before important filing and follow-up dates.
onboarding.safetyBody: Open official USCIS resources and legal-help links from inside the app.
onboarding.notice: Immigration rules can change. This app is not a law firm, does not replace USCIS instructions, and does not provide legal advice.

common.disclaimer: This app provides general information, not legal advice.

flow.datePickerHint: Choose the month, day, and year from the lists below.
flow.processSubtitle: Enter your notice date, calculate key dates, open forms, and check off your steps.
flow.verifyBody: Before you file or travel, compare your checklist with current USCIS instructions.
flow.reminderBody: Schedule alerts before your suggested date. You can clear reminders anytime.

reminders.title: Reminders
reminders.subtitle: Test your notification setup before relying on reminders.
reminders.scheduledBody: A test notification will fire in about 3 seconds.
reminders.note: iPhone: allow notifications when prompted. Android: make sure notifications are enabled in system settings.
reminders.permissionBody: Turn on notifications for this app to receive reminder alerts.
reminders.quickScheduled: Reminder created. You can remove all reminders here anytime.
reminders.receiptBody: Reminder to check for a receipt notice after filing.
reminders.deadlineBody: Reminder to review your packet before an important date.
reminders.followupBody: Reminder to check your case status and saved copies.

alerts.webReminderBody: Use the mobile app to set notifications.
alerts.expoGoNotificationsTitle: Use a preview build for reminders
alerts.expoGoNotificationsBody: Expo Go does not fully support reminder notifications in this SDK. The published app will support reminders after it is built for the stores.
alerts.pastDateBody: Please choose a time in the future.

ai.title: AI Helper
ai.homeSubtitle: Ask general questions about forms, dates, and next steps.
ai.subtitle: Ask USCIS questions, manage checklist tasks, and review your saved progress.
ai.welcome: Hi — I can answer general USCIS and immigration questions, summarize your checklist progress, set notice dates, mark steps done, open resources, and help you decide what to verify next.
ai.placeholder: Ask a question or tell me a task...
ai.noAnswer: I could not generate an answer.
ai.fallbackGeneral: I can help with general USCIS and immigration organization questions, including forms, fees, case status, reminders, and your saved checklist progress. For legal strategy or eligibility, verify with USCIS or a qualified legal representative.
ai.fallbackTps: For TPS, usually confirm your filing window, review USCIS instructions, gather identity documents, passport photos, payment, and copies, then mail with tracking if filing by mail. Verify everything with USCIS.
ai.fallbackEad: For EAD/work authorization, confirm your eligibility category, gather ID/photos/supporting documents, complete Form I-765, check the current filing fee, and keep copies. Verify with USCIS.
ai.fallbackTravel: For travel authorization, review whether travel is safe for your status, complete the correct travel form, gather supporting documents, and speak with a qualified attorney before leaving the U.S.
ai.fallbackCaseStatus: For case status, use the official USCIS case status tool with your receipt number. Keep copies of notices and compare any updates with your saved checklist.
ai.fallbackFees: For filing fees, always check the current USCIS fee page before paying. Fees can change and may vary by form, category, or filing method.
ai.fallbackRfe: For an RFE, read the notice carefully, note the deadline, gather exactly what is requested, keep copies, and consider qualified legal help if the request is unclear.
ai.fallbackBiometrics: For biometrics, follow the appointment notice, bring required ID and the notice, and do not miss the appointment unless you have official rescheduling instructions.
ai.fallbackAddress: If you move, review USCIS address-change instructions. Many applicants must update their address within a required timeframe.
ai.fallbackProcessing: Processing times vary by form, category, and office. Use the official USCIS processing-time tool and your receipt notice for the most relevant estimate.
ai.fallbackScam: Avoid anyone who guarantees results, asks you to sign blank forms, or claims special USCIS access. Use official resources and qualified legal representatives.
ai.guardBody: I can manage app checklists and explain general USCIS topics, but I cannot decide eligibility or provide legal advice.
ai.promptTasks: What can you do for me?
ai.promptUscis: How do I check USCIS case status?
ai.promptScam: How do I avoid immigration scams?
ai.progressIntro: Here is your saved checklist progress:
ai.contextHint: I can also use your saved checklist context. Try: “what is left for TPS?”, “mark passport photos done for TPS”, or “set my EAD notice date to 2026-07-01.”
ai.setupMissing: Expanded AI answers are not enabled in this version yet. I can still help with built-in USCIS guidance, official links, reminders, and your saved checklist progress.
ai.configInvalid: The online AI service is not available right now. I can still help with built-in USCIS guidance and your saved checklist progress.
ai.quotaIssue: The online AI service is temporarily unavailable. I can still help with built-in USCIS guidance and your saved checklist progress.
ai.requestFailed: The AI service could not answer right now.
ai.requestFallback: I could not reach the online AI service, so I answered with the best built-in USCIS guidance I have.
ai.capabilities: I can help with general USCIS questions, summarize your TPS/EAD/Travel checklist progress, mark checklist steps done or undone, set notice dates, schedule reminders after dates are calculated, open official resources, and explain what to verify next. I cannot provide legal advice or determine eligibility.
ai.taskNeedDate: Please include a valid date in YYYY-MM-DD format.
ai.taskDateSaved: Saved {{date}} as the notice date for {{flow}}. I recalculated the key dates:
ai.taskNeedStep: Tell me which {{flow}} step to update. You can use words from the checklist, like photos, payment, documents, fees, or copies.
ai.taskStepChecked: Marked “{{step}}” done for {{flow}}. Progress is now {{completed}}/{{total}}.
ai.taskStepUnchecked: Marked “{{step}}” not done for {{flow}}. Progress is now {{completed}}/{{total}}.
ai.taskChecklistCleared: Cleared checklist progress for {{flow}}. Dates were kept.
ai.taskNeedComputedDate: {{flow}} needs a saved suggested date first. Set a notice date or calculate the date on the checklist page.

resources.title: Resources
resources.subtitle: Use these links to verify forms, fees, case status, legal help, and scam warnings.
resources.uscisDesc: Start with the official immigration agency website.
resources.formsDesc: Open official form pages and instructions.
resources.feesDesc: Check current USCIS filing fees before paying.
resources.caseStatusDesc: Track your case through the official USCIS status tool.
resources.scamsDesc: Learn how to spot unauthorized legal advice and immigration scams.

privacy.title: Privacy & safety
privacy.subtitle: A plain-language summary of how this app handles sensitive information.
privacy.localTitle: Checklist data stays on this device
privacy.localBody: Dates and completed checklist steps are saved locally with app storage.
privacy.aiTitle: Built-in helper uses local checklist context
privacy.aiBody: In this version, the helper uses built-in guidance and local checklist progress. Do not enter private case numbers or sensitive personal details.
privacy.notificationsBody: The app only schedules reminders after notification permission is allowed.
privacy.supportBody: For app support, email admin@immigrationhelper.org. Do not send private case numbers or sensitive legal details.
privacy.officialBody: USCIS and legal-help links open outside the app in your browser.
privacy.disclaimer: This app is independent and is not affiliated with USCIS or any government agency.
